ShortDescription.Value: Faster Transit Boarding; Late solo passengers stop holding up vehicles, and bus/tram cims may start running earlier to catch their ride.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Faster public transit boarding
Still useful with patch 1.5.7-1.5.8.
The game now has a fallback for stuck transit and releases them if it's ~10 minutes past scheduled departure time. Fast Boarding helps before that by making boarding faster and reducing late-passenger delays to keep things smooth and on time.
- Improve traffic, increase transit usage, reduce bunching of vehicles. - The larger your city, the more this mod will help. - ✅ Speeds up public transit boarding/loading with simple sliders. - ✅ Lets late solo cims miss a vehicle (if it's after departure time) so everyone else is not held up. - ✅ Late cims can also start running sooner so they have a chance to catch their ride (bus + tram currently). - ✅ Adds compact Status info in Options menu and a detailed [Stats to Log] report.
### Skip Late Passengers - ✅ When **Skip Late Passengers** is enabled, late solo cims who are still **not ready** even after **departure time** can miss that vehicle instead of making everyone wait. - The cim is not deleted. The game can naturally reassign them. - Groups/families traveling together are left to vanilla methods so they are not split up.
### Cims Run sooner: Bus + Tram
- ✅ When **Cims Run Sooner** is ON, the assigned but late passengers can start running a little sooner. - Vanilla starts cims running at departure time, which can be too late to help if they are not already near the stop. - Like real life, people start running from a block away, not just at the stop. - It reduces how many cims need to be reassigned later. Currently only works for bus/trams; does not force boarding or teleport citizens.
### Status report included After the city runs a bit, check the Options menu to see current status. - *Skipped* shows how many late solo passengers have been skipped today (so they do not hold up transit). - Example usage: Worst stop shows 10+ minutes, check it for traffic, bad placement, not enough vehicles, or replace the stop. - This is a one-shot button that does not run in the city per-frame, so no real performance impact. - When checking things, I like to click the Stats button every ~20+ min, then compare the report later to see where the worst stops are and more (Scene Explorer mod helps locate the Entity ID numbers). - Use [Stats to Log] button for more detailed snapshot data than what is shown in Options menu.
### Notes - Important compatibility: conflicts possible with mods that change boarding, like All-Aboard, so Only Choose One. Some players report no issues with Smart Transportation + Fast boarding together. - Mod is intended to be a lighter, safer alternative than replacing the game's transport system files approach. - This mod works nicely with `Public Works Plus` to solve many transit issues. - Group boarding is left to normal vanilla handling to avoid splitting groups (they are few compared to the many single travelers). - Save-game safe. Safe to remove anytime. - No Harmony patches; lightweight design for low overhead. - Supports 11 languages.
### Support and feedback - If mods make the game better, give it a Like. It's an easy way to show support for free mods :) - Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., link icons on this page.
### Credits - River-Mochi_____mod author - Inspiration and thanks to bcallender's All Aboard mod and Wayze's old InstantBoarding. - yenyang_________testing and code feedback - Neco1996________testing - MayorCheeks_____testing - gagaxm__________testing - Empiiey_________testing - elGaucho87______thumbnail straightener
If you got this far, congrats, say hi, there is a senryu poem I wrote just for you in images. Click Like button, it's hard, I know, and so tiny.
tags: boarding time, bus stop, slow transit, debunching, unbunching
Publish.ChangeLog: - Add Cims Run Sooner: Bus + Tram option. - Add Italian and Polish translations. - Update all locale files to align with English. - Set 3x as default, and 5x as maximum boarding-speed scaler. - Improve status report. - Improve Stats to Log report with clearer tester hints, worst stops, entity IDs, and late-group notes. - Improve verbose diagnostic logging for testers.
